title: After the Debut: Whoa, For Real?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Hey, bestie. Well, I guess I did it,
but like...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I don't think I lived it up enough out there... Hahaha... Sigh...
choice_data_list: Can you say that again, but with more slang?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You wanna hear me slangmaxxing, huh? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oof, talk about cringe! No shade to myself, but that debut was low key so cheugy! Was that even for real? Like, I can't even!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hey, girl, you totally nailed that! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but I can only do that if it's just the two of
you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm not used to being in the spotlight. Ryan and
McQueen have been dealing with people's high
expectations for ages, but me? Not so much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly being the center of everyone's attention
just 'cause I'm making my debut is like... major
yikes, y'know? Hahaha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's internally fighting an uphill battle. Mejiro
Palmer wants to be her true party gal self, but the
scrutinizing gazes are weighing down on her
heavily...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Palmster! ☆ C'mon, let's take in the blue sky
or something! ♪ We gotta pull you out of the
dumps!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right. I won't be able to win my
future races with an attitude like this.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Aw, girl, that's not what I meant.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: You're hurting right now, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Me, hurting? Do I look that miserable?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Lemme tell you something!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I waaay prefer it when you're happy and smiling,
like when we're hanging out, doing whatever! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Your smile's so contagious, I always feel happy
when I see it! ☆ Your vibes? Straight fire! ★ Being
with you is so fun! ♪ You're, like, the best!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You've got mad aura when you're livin' it up and
getting hyped! So you know what? ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I think we should roll with the punches life swings
at us and just laugh at 'em! That's what we
baddies gotta do to keep slaying! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Bestie... My sun...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right. I can't be letting a little extra
attention throw me off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I've gotta let loose and have fun. Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The number one thing Mejiro Palmer needs right
now is fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm gonna nail my next race for sure!
Okay, what should I choose as my next goal race?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whatever it is, I'm gonna bring the party to the
track and run the way I want!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think for a moment. Letting her party her heart
out on a big stage would be a good idea, but...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Real talk, but wouldn't it be better if you just
focused on living your truth first, rather than
living it up at a race?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Love what you do, and you'll run better for it. I
bet you'll start attracting fans who like your style
too.
choice_data_list: Hm, attract fans with her new image, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we let Mejiro Palmer simply enjoy each day, I
have a feeling her fanbase will grow organically
and proportionally to her "vibes."
choice_data_list:
Okay, let's focus on expanding your fanbase
first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why do we have to focus on gaining fans?
choice_data_list:
Having more fans will translate to more freedom
to be yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My main focus will be to encourage Mejiro Palmer
to live each day to her fullest. We can decide how
to proceed after seeing how that goes.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wahey-hey! ☆ Sounds like it's time for you to
hang out with me and party hard on Umastagram,
Palmster! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Let's make you go viral so you can rack up those
followers! How's 10,000 sound for starters?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
10,000? Hm, it would be pretty great if I could
actually gain that many fans just by goofing
around, running, and living it up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right! You know what they say! Work hard,
play hard! I'm gonna party hard and race just as
hard!

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey-heeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's to run free, her mind and heart also has to
be free. As a way to roughly measure that
freedom, we decide her goal is to gain at least
9,000 fans.
